name: Safed Gosht- Lamb Stewed in Coconut Milk - India
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lbs shoulder of lamb, cut into 1 1/2-inch cubes
1 lb potatoes, peeled and cut into 1 1/2-inch cubes
2 medium carrots, peeled and cut into 3 pieces each
recipeInstructions:
1. Put oil in a pressure cooker and set over medium-high heat.
2. When the oil is hot, add curry leaves, cinnamon, cardamom, cloves, and peppercorns.
3. Stir once, then add onion. Sauté for 1 1/2 minutes or until onion is soft.
4. Add meat, potatoes, carrots, turmeric, coriander, cayenne, green chilies, salt, and 1 cup of the stirred coconut milk.
5. Securely cover with lid and bring to full pressure on high heat.
6. Turn the heat to low and cook for 15 minutes.
7. Lower the pressure by pouring cool water onto the lid and remove the lid.
8. Cook uncovered over high heat for 5-6 minutes, stirring gently.
9. Add the remaining coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
10. Turn off the heat.
